task_description: Phase 17: Implement E2E Encryption using Signal Protocol primitives (X3DH, Double Ratchet), MLS group key management, ZK Email, sealed sender, encrypted backup, device linking, and safety numbers. All crypto via Node.js crypto module + openpgp for email.

verification.summary: All 169 new tests pass (120 in packages/auth, 49 in apps/quantchat). Only pre-existing failures are 26 tests in packages/shared-ui/components.test.tsx (jsdom env issue, unrelated). Tests exercise real crypto operations including full Alice-Bob-Alice round-trips, forward secrecy verification, ciphertext-not-plaintext assertions, and OpenPGP key generation/encryption.
